mapper.sql: id, gupiao_code, `gupiao_name`, signal_date, ploy_type, ploy_name, commission_price, target_price, tendency, is_use, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gupiao (gupiao_code, `gupiao_name`, signal_date, ploy_type, ploy_name, commission_price, target_price, tendency) VALUES
(#{piao.piaoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piao.piaoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piao.signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{piao.ployType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{piao.ployName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piao.commissionPrice, jdbcType=DATE}, #{piao.targetPrice, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{piao.tendency, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM gupiao WHERE is_use=1 AND signal_date=#{signalDate, jdbcType=DATE}
